name: smart-stadiums-tournament-operations
description: Smart Stadiums & Tournament Operations - FIFA World Cup 2026

scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix client
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client"
scripts.build: npm install --include=dev --prefix client && npm run build --prefix client
scripts.vercel-build: npm install --include=dev --prefix client && npm run build --prefix client
scripts.test: npm test --prefix server && npm test --prefix client
